ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Remove Probate Referee
Off Calendar Dec-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Gullotta for administrator Eduardo Jimenez de Jesus (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition to Remove Probate Referee.

Mr. Gullotta confirmed that no objections had been filed or raised to the instant petition.

There being no objections, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant. Karen Simons shall be removed as probate referee, and Amy Harrington shall be appointed as the new probate referee for this estate.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
